description: The Command Line Interface (CLI) of OpenClaw

next.name: acp
tip: Run an ACP bridge backed by the Gateway.

option.name: --no-prefix-cwd
tip: Do not prefix prompts with the working directory.

option.name: --require-existing
tip: Fail if the session key/label does not exist.

option.name: --reset-session
tip: Reset the session key before first use.

next.name: client
tip: Run an interactive ACP client against the local ACP bridge.

next.name: agent
tip: Run an agent turn via the Gateway (use --local for embedded).

next.name: bind
tip: Add routing bindings for an agent.

next.name: delete
tip: Delete an agent and prune workspace/state.

next.name: unbind
tip: Remove routing bindings for an agent.

next.name: approvals
tip: Manage exec approvals (gateway or node host).

next.name: set
tip: Replace exec approvals with a JSON file.

next.name: attach
tip: Attach Claude Code to a gateway session with scoped MCP tools.

next.name: audit
tip: Inspect metadata-only agent run and tool action records.

next.name: backup
tip: Create and verify local backup archives for OpenClaw state.

next.name: create
tip: Write a backup archive for config, credentials, sessions, and workspaces.

next.name: verify
tip: Validate a backup archive and its embedded manifest.

next.name: capability
tip: Run provider capability commands (fallback alias: infer).

next.name: channels
tip: Manage connected chat channels and accounts.

next.name: add
tip: Add or update a channel account.

next.name: list
tip: List chat channels (configured by default; pass --all for installable catalog).

next.name: logout
tip: Log out of a channel session (if supported).

next.name: logs
tip: Show recent channel logs from the gateway log file.

next.name: remove
tip: Disable or delete a channel account.

next.name: status
tip: Show gateway channel status (use status --deep for local).

next.name: chat
tip: Open a local terminal UI (alias for tui --local).

next.name: commitments
tip: List and manage inferred follow-up commitments.

next.name: config
tip: Run without subcommand for guided setup.

next.name: file
tip: Print the active config file path.

next.name: get
tip: Get a config value by dot path.

next.name: patch
tip: Patch config from a JSON5 object in one validated write.

next.name: schema
tip: Print the JSON schema for openclaw.json.

next.name: set
tip: Set config values by path (value mode, ref/provider builder mode, or batch JSON mode).

next.name: unset
tip: Remove a config value by dot path.

next.name: validate
tip: Validate the current config against the schema without starting the gateway.

next.name: configure
tip: Interactive configuration for credentials, channels, gateway, and agent defaults.

next.name: crestodian
tip: Open the ring-zero setup and repair helper.

next.name: get
tip: Get a cron job as JSON.

next.name: status
tip: Show service install status + probe connectivity/capability.

next.name: dashboard
tip: Open the Control UI with your current token.

next.name: approve
tip: Approve a pending device pairing request.

next.name: clear
tip: Clear paired devices from the gateway table.

next.name: reject
tip: Reject a pending device pairing request.

next.name: revoke
tip: Revoke a device token for a role.

next.name: rotate
tip: Rotate a device token for a role.

next.name: directory
tip: Lookup contact and group IDs for supported chat channels.

next.name: dns
tip: DNS helpers for wide-area discovery (Tailscale + CoreDNS).

next.name: setup
tip: Set up CoreDNS to serve your discovery domain.

next.name: doctor
tip: Health checks + quick fixes for the gateway and channels.

next.name: set
tip: Replace exec approvals with a JSON file.

next.name: exec-policy
tip: Show or synchronize requested exec policy with host approvals.

next.name: gateway
tip: Run, inspect, and query the WebSocket Gateway.

option.name: --allow-unconfigured
tip: Allow gateway start without enforcing gateway.mode=local in config.

option.name: --cli-backend-logs
tip: Only show CLI backend logs in the console.

option.name: --dev
tip: Create a dev config + workspace if missing.

option.name: --force
tip: Kill any existing listener on the target port before starting.

option.name: --raw-stream
tip: Log raw model stream events to jsonl.

option.name: --reset
tip: Reset dev config + credentials + sessions + workspace (requires --dev).

option.name: --tailscale-reset-on-exit
tip: Reset Tailscale serve/funnel configuration on shutdown.

next.name: discover
tip: Discover gateways via Bonjour (local + wide-area if configured).

next.name: probe
tip: Show gateway reachability, auth capability, and read-probe summary.

next.name: status
tip: Show gateway service status + probe connectivity/capability.

next.name: usage-cost
tip: Fetch usage cost summary from session logs.

next.name: health
tip: Fetch health from the running gateway.

next.name: info
tip: Show detailed information about a hook.

next.name: infer
tip: Run provider-backed inference commands through a stable CLI surface.

next.name: list
tip: List canonical capability ids and supported transports.

next.name: model
tip: Text inference and model catalog commands.

next.name: logs
tip: Tail gateway file logs via RPC.

next.name: mcp
tip: Manage OpenClaw mcp.servers config and channel bridge.

next.name: add
tip: Add one MCP server from flags and probe it before saving.

next.name: configure
tip: Update MCP server operator controls without replacing the server.

next.name: doctor
tip: Check configured MCP servers for static setup problems.

next.name: list
tip: List OpenClaw-managed MCP servers from mcp.servers.

next.name: logout
tip: Clear stored OAuth credentials for an MCP server.

next.name: probe
tip: Connect to configured MCP servers and list available capabilities.

next.name: reload
tip: Dispose cached MCP runtimes so new config is used on the next turn.

next.name: serve
tip: Expose OpenClaw channels over MCP stdio.

next.name: set
tip: Set one OpenClaw-managed MCP server from a JSON object.

next.name: show
tip: Show one OpenClaw-managed MCP server or the full mcp.servers config.

next.name: status
tip: Show configured MCP server transport status without connecting.

next.name: tools
tip: Update per-server MCP tool include/exclude filters.

next.name: memory
tip: Search, inspect, and reindex memory files.

next.name: promote
tip: Rank short-term recalls and optionally append top entries to MEMORY.md.

next.name: promote-explain
tip: Explain a specific promotion candidate and its score breakdown.

next.name: rem-backfill
tip: Write grounded historical REM summaries into DREAMS.md for UI review.

next.name: rem-harness
tip: Preview REM reflections, candidate truths, and deep promotions without writing.

next.name: message
tip: Send, read, and manage messages and channel actions.

next.name: broadcast
tip: Broadcast a message to multiple targets.

next.name: migrate
tip: Import state from another agent system.

option.name: --backup-output
tip: Pre-migration backup archive path or directory.

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Preview only; do not apply changes.

option.name: --overwrite
tip: Overwrite conflicting target files after item-level backups.

option.name: --plugin
tip: Select one Codex plugin to migrate.

option.name: --verify-plugin-apps
tip: Codex only: verify source plugin app accessibility.

next.name: apply
tip: Apply a migration after a verified backup.

next.name: plan
tip: Preview a migration without changing OpenClaw state.

next.name: scan
tip: Scan OpenRouter free models for tools + images.

next.name: node
tip: Run and manage the headless node host service.

next.name: nodes
tip: Manage gateway-owned nodes (pairing, status, invoke, and media).

next.name: camera
tip: Capture camera media from a paired node.

next.name: canvas
tip: Capture or render canvas content from a paired node.

next.name: describe
tip: Describe a node (capabilities + supported invoke commands).

next.name: invoke
tip: Invoke a command on a paired node.

next.name: location
tip: Fetch location from a paired node.

next.name: notify
tip: Send a local notification on a node (mac only).

next.name: push
tip: Send an APNs test push to an iOS node.

next.name: rename
tip: Rename a paired node (display name override).

next.name: screen
tip: Capture screen recordings from a paired node.

next.name: status
tip: List known nodes with connection status and capabilities.

next.name: onboard
tip: Guided setup for auth, models, Gateway, workspace, channels, and skills.

next.name: approve
tip: Approve a pairing code and allow that sender.

next.name: install
tip: Install a plugin or hook pack.

next.name: registry
tip: Inspect or rebuild the persisted plugin registry.

next.name: update
tip: Update installed plugins and tracked hook packs.

next.name: promos
tip: Discover and claim promotional model offers from ClawHub.

next.name: claim
tip: Claim a promotion: set up provider auth and register its models.

next.name: proxy
tip: Run the OpenClaw debug proxy and inspect captured traffic.

next.name: blob
tip: Read a captured payload blob by id.

next.name: coverage
tip: Report current debug proxy transport coverage and remaining gaps.

next.name: purge
tip: Delete all captured traffic metadata and blobs.

next.name: query
tip: Run a built-in query preset against captured traffic.

next.name: run
tip: Run a child command with OpenClaw debug proxy capture enabled.

next.name: start
tip: Start the local explicit debug proxy.

next.name: qr
tip: Generate a mobile pairing QR code and setup code.

next.name: reset
tip: Reset local config/state (keeps the CLI installed).

next.name: explain
tip: Explain effective sandbox/tool policy for a session/agent.

next.name: list
tip: List sandbox containers and their status.

next.name: recreate
tip: Remove containers to force recreation with updated config.

next.name: apply
tip: Apply a previously generated secrets plan.

next.name: audit
tip: Audit plaintext secrets, unresolved refs, and precedence drift.

next.name: configure
tip: Interactive secrets helper (provider setup + SecretRef mapping + preflight).

next.name: reload
tip: Re-resolve secret references and atomically swap runtime snapshot.

next.name: security
tip: Audit local config and state for common security foot-guns.

next.name: audit
tip: Audit config + local state for common security foot-guns.

option.name: --active
tip: Only show sessions updated within the past N minutes.

option.name: --all-agents
tip: Aggregate sessions across all configured agents.

option.name: --limit
tip: Max sessions to show (default: 100; use "all" for full output).

next.name: compact
tip: Compact a stored session transcript via the running gateway.

next.name: export-trajectory
tip: Export a redacted trajectory bundle for a stored session.

next.name: check
tip: Check which skills are ready, visible, or missing requirements.

next.name: curator
tip: Inspect and manage skill lifecycle curation.

next.name: info
tip: Show detailed information about a skill.

next.name: install
tip: Install a skill from ClawHub, git, or a local directory.

next.name: update
tip: Update ClawHub-installed skills in the active or shared managed directory.

next.name: verify
tip: Verify a ClawHub skill with ClawHub.

next.name: status
tip: Show channel health and recent session recipients.

next.name: event
tip: Enqueue a system event and optionally trigger a heartbeat.

next.name: tasks
tip: Inspect durable background tasks and TaskFlow state.

option.name: --runtime
tip: Filter by kind (subagent, acp, cron, cli).

next.name: audit
tip: Show stale or broken background tasks and TaskFlows.

next.name: flow
tip: Inspect durable TaskFlow state under tasks.

next.name: maintenance
tip: Preview or apply tasks and TaskFlow maintenance.

next.name: show
tip: Show one background task by task id, run id, or session key.

next.name: terminal
tip: Open a local terminal UI (alias for tui --local).

next.name: path
tip: Print a stored transcripts artifact path.

next.name: show
tip: Print a transcript summary markdown file.

next.name: tui
tip: Open a terminal UI connected to the Gateway.

next.name: uninstall
tip: Uninstall the gateway service + local data (CLI remains).

next.name: update
tip: Update OpenClaw and inspect update channel status.

option.name: --acknowledge-clawhub-risk
tip: Acknowledge ClawHub release trust warnings during post-update plugin sync.

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Preview update actions without making changes.

option.name: --no-restart
tip: Skip restarting the gateway service after a successful update.

option.name: --tag
tip: Override the package target for this update.

option.name: --timeout
tip: Timeout for each update step in seconds (default: 1800).

next.name: repair
tip: Repair post-update doctor and plugin convergence.

next.name: status
tip: Show update channel and version status.

next.name: worktrees
tip: Create, inspect, restore, and clean up managed worktrees.

next.name: list
tip: List active and restorable managed worktrees.

next.name: remove
tip: Snapshot and remove a managed worktree.

next.name: restore
tip: Restore a managed worktree from its snapshot.

option.name: --container
tip: Run the CLI inside a running Podman/Docker container named <name>.

option.name: --dev
tip: Dev profile: isolate state under ~/.openclaw-dev, default gateway port 19001, and shift derived ports.

option.name: --log-level
tip: Global log level override for file + console.

option.name: --profile
tip: Use a named profile (isolates OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH under ~/.openclaw-<name>).
